title: galeopsis × carinthiaca
intro: Galeopsis × carinthiaca, also known as Kramm's galeopsis, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is a cross between Galeopsis ladanum and Galeopsis tetrahit. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Galeopsis × carinthiaca include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease congestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
